query:
SELECT 
  'ip_accounts' as table_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM ip_accounts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_posts', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_posts_viral', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isViral = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_posts_super_viral', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isSuperViral = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_success_factors', COUNT(*) FROM ip_success_factors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'global_viral_rules', COUNT(*) FROM global_viral_rules
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_post_embeddings', COUNT(*) FROM ip_post_embeddings;
